svg.text: A sampling grid reads each region of a frame, then spawns a small cluster of points that share its color.
A sampling grid reads each region's color
Each region becomes a cluster of points
One sampled region becomes seven points
685,965 points by default — 417 × 235 sampled regions × 7 points per region.
The browser version uses lower density for real-time performance. A renderer — not a filter, not AI, not a physics simulation.
